name: @aipehub/example-acp-coding-bridge
description: acp-agent demo — the hub MANAGES a coding agent from startup, HOLDS one ACP (Agent Client Protocol) session, and dispatches many tasks to it (OpenClaw-style). All five AGENT-ADAPTER-CONTRACT seams (observe+hold / intercept / handoff / resume / terminate) shown against a deterministic mock ACP server. Swap command/args for an ACP_PRESETS entry to drive a real Claude Code / Codex.
